physical.title: Crafted in Wood.
physical.subtitle: Held in your hands.
physical.description: Precision-cut from premium wood. Each piece a character. Together, a universe.
physical.body:
We didn't set out to make a puzzle. We set out to make something that feels alive.

Wild is nineteen handcrafted wooden characters — each one unique, each one connected to the others in ways you'll spend a long time discovering. There are no edges. No corners. No single solution waiting patiently at the end. Just infinite formations, each one yours, each one unrepeatable.

We tested it in therapy rooms and research labs. On kitchen tables and conference floors. With kids who couldn't stop laughing and adults who forgot to check their phones. Something kept happening in those rooms — a kind of focused, present, slightly chaotic joy.

That's what we're selling. The chaos. The joy. The weird magic of nineteen pieces finding each other.

Handmade. HDF with digitally printed linen surface. Comes in a colourful illustrated box. Assembled diameter ~30 cm.

One puzzle. Infinite stories. Yours starts here.

digitalPromise.description: Every arrangement you create is one-of-a-kind. Scan your formation, unlock your universe.

chapter1.title: Stockholm to Portugal on a Gut Feeling
chapter1.text: I had no plan. I had an intention — something in my gut that said go. So I decided to cycle from Stockholm to Portugal. No destination, no deadline. Just the road and whatever it had to teach me. Somewhere in Denmark, a woodworker offered me his home for as long as I wanted to stay. He handed me two packs of cigarettes and the key to his workshop. I made my first puzzle there — oak, hand-colored with pencils, rough and alive. I carried it with me the rest of the way south, pulling it out to show strangers in cafés and squares, watching their hands reach for the pieces without being asked. By the time I reached Portugal, the characters had started drawing themselves.

chapter2.title: One Puzzle Wasn't Enough
chapter2.text: One puzzle became three. Then the universe started filling itself in. I took the puzzles everywhere — therapy groups, research labs, kids, adults, corporate team building sessions where people forgot they were supposed to be productive. Something kept happening in those rooms. People got quiet in a different way. Focused. Present. I couldn't explain it scientifically and I didn't try. I just kept making more puzzles. Each one premium — thick pine, digital print, handmade boxes with screen print. Each one a little more ambitious than the last. Each one trying to say something the previous one hadn't figured out yet.

chapter3.title: They Flew Me to New York
chapter3.text: I won a spot at Formex Design Talents. Got written up in a few places. And then, in the middle of all of it, my body staged a full rebellion — TBE and Borrelia, the kind of sick where you start doing the math on your situation and the math isn't great. I spent a long time not knowing how it was going to go. It went fine. Mostly. And then I got an invitation to Puzzle Parley in Rochester, New York — as an international guest. You don't say no to that. A stage. A hundred and sixty-five puzzle obsessives who had flown in from everywhere. A presentation and a workshop I had been building toward without knowing it. On the flight home, somewhere over the Atlantic, I wrote four words in my notes: the best time of my life. I meant it.

chapter4.title: Wild. And It's Just Getting Started
chapter4.text: I packed and shipped the last premium puzzles. Wrote the last handmade label. Closed a chapter that had taken eight years to write. Then Oscar and Erik showed up, and the whole thing got bigger. Wild is nineteen characters with their own logic, their own connections, their own stories waiting to be unlocked. It's not a universe that someone else built and handed to you. It's one that grows every time someone sits down with it, every time a new formation appears that has never existed before and never will again. I don't own it anymore. We do. You're holding the beginning of it.

catalog.title: Wild is Chapter One.
catalog.subtitle: The universe is just getting started.
catalog.description: The first chapter of the Infinity Puzzles universe. 19 characters, countless formations, one extraordinary object.

characters_page.title: All 19 Characters
characters_page.subtitle: Each piece is a world. Each world is a story.

about.title: About Infinity Puzzles
about.subtitle: A universe in your hands.
about.story: Infinity Puzzles was born from a simple question: what if a puzzle was never finished? Wild is our first answer — 19 characters that can form thousands of unique configurations, each with its own story.
about.mission: We believe play should be limitless. Every formation you discover is yours alone.
